title: Dense Tangy French Pecorino Gratin
description: A rich, post-workout French dish featuring a tangy pecorino cheese, perfect for a quick recovery meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Toss the asparagus with olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl, then grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly, and cook until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the cheese until melted and smooth.
Stir in the lemon juice and garlic.
Arrange the grilled asparagus on a baking sheet, then spoon the cheese sauce over the top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Sprinkle with parsley and serve hot.
